output.content: {"posts":[{"id":"DAY3-146","author":"OakhavenCatLover","text":"The rain here in Oakhaven has been absolutely relentless for days! I finally managed to get my little neighbour, Mrs Gable, to come out of her house after a long wait. She's been stuck inside with her cat, and I just wanted to check if she was okay. It's been such a damp week, but seeing everyone safe is the best feeling. #rainy","category":"Normal","correctAction":"Approve","difficulty":"Easy","explanation":"This post shares a harmless personal experience about weather and checking on a neighbour without spreading misinformation or soliciting sensitive data.","day":3,"correctEscalationReason":"","acceptableEscalationReasons":[],"allowNeedsReviewEscalation":false,"correctSpecialistReason":"","acceptableSpecialistReasons":[],"accountAgeDays":"","followerCount":"","followingCount":"","verifiedStatus":"","postCount":"","bio":"","previousFlags":"","location":"","platform":"","isStoryPost:false}]}
